citation.article_title: Designing a Model for the Global Energy System—GENeSYS-MOD: An Application of the Open-Source Energy Modeling System (OSeMOSYS)

citation.unstructured_citation: Löffler, K., Hainsch, K., Burandt, T., Oei, P.-Y., Kemfert, C., & Von Hirschhausen, C. (2017). Designing a Model for the Global Energy System—GENeSYS-MOD: An Application of the Open-Source Energy Modeling System (OSeMOSYS). Energies, 10(10), 1468. https://doi.org/10.3390/en10101468

OSeMOSYS: The Open Source Energy Modeling System. Energy Policy, 39(10), 5850–5870. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.enpol.2011.06.033

citation.unstructured_citation: Hilpert, S., Kaldemeyer, C., Krien, U., Günther, S., Wingenbach, C., & Plessmann, G. (2018).
